CVE-2025-1860.title: Data::Entropy for Perl 0.007 and earlier use the rand() function  ...
CVE-2025-1860.description: Data::Entropy for Perl 0.007 and earlier use the rand() function as the default source of entropy, which is not cryptographically secure, for cryptographic functions.
